titleStmt.title: SII 38.358: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 358. (A.R. No. 358 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadēvamahārāya Year: Śaka 1441, Bahudhānya, Kaṟkaṭaka śu. 13, Tuesday Aśvini = 20 July, 1518 A.D. But the Śaka era is 1440; star is Pūraṭṭadi.

summary.p: This inscription is clumsily engraved and records that Harihara Nāyakkaṉ, son of Mallappa-Nāyakkar, the Kaṉṉaḍiya nāyakka-pāḍigal who resided at Marudarasarpaḍaivīdu had endowed (the tax) 33(1/2) paṇam to the temple of Tirumalar-uḍaiya-nāyiṉār at Dēvikkāpuram. This money was the tax levied on the shepherds of Kāṅgēyankuppam, which was owned by Harihara Nāyakaṇ. This gift was made for the merit of Kṛishṇadēvarāya and Tirumalai Nāyakkar on the occasion of the lunar eclipse which occurred on the 27th day of Vaikāsi in the cyclic year of Vegutāṉiya.
The names of the shepherds (maṉṟāḍiyaḷ) and the amount of tax remitted by each of them, is given.
Harihara Nāyakka, figures as a signatory, while the temple accountant Uttaṇḍi, son of Īśura Mādarasan Nāyaṉ Appar, wrote this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī man mahāmaṇḍaleśvara metiṉi micurakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva kṛṣṇadevamahārāyar pradhivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 4 10 1 melcellā niṉṟa vekutāṉiya varuṣattu
kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu trayodaciyum bhaumāśviniyum peṟṟa cittayokattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟa koṭṭattu melkuṉṟanāṭu murukamaṅkala
paṟṟu Irācakempiraṉmalaikku Aṭutta teṉkaṇṭam ceyyāṟṟu teṉpirivu tevastāṉam tevakkāpuram nayiṉār tirumalaruṭaiya nayiṉār śrīpaṇṭārattukku marutaracarpaṭaiviṭṭil
Irukkum kaṉṉaṭiyanāyakkapāṭikaḷil mallappanāyakkaputran Arikara nāyakkaṉ cuvāmi krakṣṇadevamahārāyaṟku puṇṇiyamākavum tirumalai nāyakkaṟku puṇṇiyamākavum
taṉma cilācātaṉam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi yeṉṉiṭaiya cirmai Āṉa paṭaiviṭṭukku Iṭattuṟai Iṟukkum kuṭiyaḷ kāṅkaiyankuppattil Irukkum maṉṟāṭiyaḷ Iṟukkum varuṣam 1kku
kaṉṉaracevvaṉum Ivantampi ṉūkkaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār ø6 vaṅka polu økkañ caṇan matankūṉu mā3 kampaṇa nāyakak kevaṉum Ivan tampi pommaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭārkku Āṭalūr
kiḻāraṉ makaṉ cevvar Uḷḷiṭṭār paṅku ventoṭṭu toṇṭaṉ makaṉ nūkkaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār te kuṇṭa poyaṉ pāppaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār makāaṟaiyattūr Irukaṇ Uḷḷiṭṭār U
meṟpaṭiyūr ciraṅka timmaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār meṟpaṭiyūr koṭuku polumaka nicaṅkaṉ ø8 poḷiyūr kañcaṇan makaṉ ciṟukūṉaṉ namakku Āka Ivarkaḷ Iṟukkum paṅku 3kku Inta

paṇam muppattu muṉṟaraiyum Inta kuṭiyaḷum vekutāṉiya varuṣam vaikāci mātam 27 kku comakiṟāṇapuṇṇiya kālattile cuvāmi kṛkṣayaRead kriṣṇatevamakāirāyaṟku puṇṇiyamāka
tirumalaruṭaiya nayiṉārkku caṉtirātittavaraiyu naṭattittarat tāraivāttu kuṭutteṉ Inta tarumattukku Akitam paṇṇi paṇṇiṉavar Akitam paṇṇina peruṇṭāṉāl
keṅkaikaraiyile kārāmpacuvaiyum pirāmaṇaṉaiyum vataitta pāvattile poka kaṭavārkaḷākavum Ivai Arikaranāyakkar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Inta kalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku
koyilkaṇakku yicuran mātaracan nāyaṉ Appar puttiraṉ Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu dānapālanayormmuddhye dānayecrayonu pālana(ā)m dānāt svargamavā
pnota palanādacyutam padam śrīsubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 38.358 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
